## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality to `UiNode` or `GenerativeRenderer`)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing JSON structures to break)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (changes to `README.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`, etc.)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] I passed a test JSON payload through `GenUIParser`
- [ ] I verified the UI renders correctly on an Android device/emulator

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the Kotlin style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in complex Jetpack Compose UI trees
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
